ddls:
CREATE TABLE "video_files" (
  "video_file_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each video file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the video file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the video file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the video file (e.g., MP4, AVI) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Length of the video file in seconds */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the video file (e.g., 1080p, 720p) */,
  "fps" INTEGER /* Frames per second of the video file */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* Thumbnail image of the video file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity (e.g., closing, walking, running) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the activity (e.g., human, animal, vehicle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_detections" (
  "detection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity detection */,
  "video_file_id" TEXT /* ID of the video file the activity was detected in */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity detected */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the activity detection (between 0 and 1) */,
  "frame_start" INTEGER /* Starting frame number of the activity detection */,
  "frame_end" INTEGER /* Ending frame number of the activity detection */,
  "detection_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity was detected */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for activity detection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_detections_video_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_file_id") REFERENCES video_files ("video_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_detections_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, developer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the video file */,
  "video_file_id" TEXT /* ID of the video file being interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, download, annotation) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_video_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_file_id") REFERENCES video_files ("video_file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the annotation */,
  "video_file_id" TEXT /* ID of the video file being annotated */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation (e.g., text, drawing, audio) */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_video_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_file_id") REFERENCES video_files ("video_file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the system log was generated */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the system log */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the system log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_category" TEXT /* Category of the system log (e.g., video processing, user interaction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
